title: Emma's Sleepy Stars
synopsis: Little Emma gets ready for bed with Mama's help, watching the beautiful stars appear in the night sky before drifting off to peaceful sleep.

pages.text: Emma yawns. It's bedtime! Mama holds Emma's hand.

illustration.description: Emma, a little girl with straight blonde hair in a ponytail, fair skin, bright blue eyes, rosy cheeks, yawning while holding her mama's hand in a cozy bedroom, soft watercolor, dreamy purple and blue gradients, glowing stars visible through the window, round sleepy faces, floating clouds, gentle moonlight, ethereal atmosphere, pastel palette
illustration.alt: Emma yawning and holding mama's hand at bedtime

pages.text: "Look, Emma," says Mama. "The stars are coming out to say goodnight."

illustration.description: Emma with straight blonde hair in a ponytail, fair skin, bright blue eyes, rosy cheeks, looking out a window with her mama at twinkling stars in the evening sky, soft watercolor, dreamy purple and blue gradients, glowing stars, round sleepy faces, floating clouds, gentle moonlight, ethereal atmosphere, pastel palette
illustration.alt: Emma and mama looking at stars through the window

pages.text: Emma waves at the stars. "Night-night, stars!" The stars twinkle back.

illustration.description: Emma with straight blonde hair in a ponytail, fair skin, bright blue eyes, rosy cheeks, waving at sparkling stars outside her window, the stars seeming to twinkle in response, soft watercolor, dreamy purple and blue gradients, glowing stars, round sleepy faces, floating clouds, gentle moonlight, ethereal atmosphere, pastel palette
illustration.alt: Emma waving goodnight to twinkling stars

pages.text: Mama tucks Emma into her soft bed. "Sweet dreams, little star."

illustration.description: Emma with straight blonde hair in a ponytail, fair skin, bright blue eyes, rosy cheeks, being tucked into bed by mama under a cozy blanket, soft watercolor, dreamy purple and blue gradients, glowing stars, round sleepy faces, floating clouds, gentle moonlight streaming through the window, ethereal atmosphere, pastel palette

pages.text: Emma closes her eyes. The gentle stars watch over her as she sleeps.

illustration.description: Emma with straight blonde hair in a ponytail, fair skin, bright blue eyes, rosy cheeks, sleeping peacefully in her bed with stars visible through the window casting gentle light over her, soft watercolor, dreamy purple and blue gradients, glowing stars, round sleepy faces, floating clouds, gentle moonlight, ethereal atmosphere, pastel palette
illustration.alt: Emma sleeping peacefully under the starlight

metadata.illustrationStyle: soft watercolor, dreamy purple and blue gradients, glowing stars, round sleepy faces, floating clouds, gentle moonlight, ethereal atmosphere, pastel palette

questions.question: What does Emma see outside her window?
questions.explanation: Emma sees beautiful stars twinkling in the night sky outside her window.

questions.question: Who helps Emma get ready for bed?
questions.explanation: Mama helps Emma get ready for bed and tucks her in safely.

questions.question: What does Emma say to the stars?
questions.explanation: Emma waves and says 'Night-night, stars!' to the twinkling stars.
